## Summary

What does this PR do and why?

## Breaking changes

Does this change CLI flags, exit codes, output format, or default behaviour?
If so, describe what breaks and how users should adapt.

- [ ] No breaking changes

## Checklist

- [ ] `bats test/*.bats` passes
- [ ] `shellcheck smoosh` passes with zero warnings
- [ ] `shfmt -d -i 2 smoosh` shows no diff
- [ ] New behaviour has tests
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] `--help` text updated (if flags changed)

Decisions, trade-offs, or areas to focus during review.
